name: conductor
description: Universal task runner & dashboard for developers

scripts.dev:desktop: bun run --cwd packages/core build:sidecar && bun run --cwd packages/ui build && bun run --cwd packages/desktop dev
scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/cli build && bun run --cwd packages/ui build
scripts.build:desktop: bun run --cwd packages/core build:sidecar && bun run --cwd packages/ui build && bun run --cwd packages/desktop dist
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/core typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/cli typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/ui typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/desktop typecheck
